titleStmt.title: SII 8.265: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 265. (A.R. No. 660 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE MANDAPA OF THE ANAIKATTA-PERUMAL TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tri[bhuva] ṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarācaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3vatu siṁ hanāyaṟṟu Amarapa[kṣa]ttu Aṣṭamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Urocaṇi nāḷ kiṭāmpi śrīnā rasiṁha paṭṭaṉeṉ nila vilaipramā ṇam teṉpuṟaṇi Irācarācavaḷanāṭṭuveṇṭāḻaināṭṭu vākūruṭaiyāṉ meykkuntevar makaṉār cokkanāyaṉār vicaiyakaṇṭakopālaṟku nila vilaipramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu . Iṟṟaināḷ Ivaṟku nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivūr piṭākai kaḷappāḷ cuttavallinallūr nilam 3 10 4ma� coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam 10 5ra�
pa Āka nilam 5 10�ma Iṉṉilam Aimpatumāk kāṇiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmi licainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭunaṟkāciṉāl � 1000 5 100 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Aiññūṟum Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccilavaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramā ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maraṅkaḷum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟukaḷum pākamum pākāśra yaṅkaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Urimaikaḷu makappaṭa viṟṟukkuṭutta Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvutākavum Ituve poruḷmāvilaiyākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava tallavākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup
poruḷaṟa kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipra māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ cokkanāyaṉār vicaiyakaṇṭakopālaṟku kiṭāmpi śrīnārasiṁha paṭṭaṉeṉ . śrīnārasiṁha- paṭṭaṉ taṟkuṟiyāṉamaikku Ūrkkaṇakku kuḻalūruṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkāḻvāṉeṉ Eṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ piḷḷai ten tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉāṉa naraciṅkapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ Āṉatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭaṉeṉ . Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ cāṇṭilaṉ varatarācapaṭṭaṉeṉ Ippaṭi yaṟiveṉ viḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Eṟutiruvuṭaiyāṉeṉ . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veḷḷainallūruṭaiyāṉeṉ .
Inta cātaṉattiṉpaṭi palarum pramā ṇam paṇṇukaiyil palarpakkalilum ko ṇṭatāvatu cātaṉam Oṉṟiṉāl koṇṭi varatarācapaṭṭaṉpakkal koṇṭa piṭākai cuttavallinallūr nilam 3 10 5 � kku � 1000 5 10 Ippaṇam Āyirattu Aimpatukku nila muppattañcu māvum Ivvāṇṭu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu [tri] tiyaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa vicākattu nāḷ kāṟkiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉpaṭṭar pakkal koṇṭa cuttavallinallūr nilam 3� I cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam 4 10 8� I-m coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam 5� Āka nilam 5 10 7�- kku � 1000 7 100 Ippaṇam ĀyiratThe continuation is lost.

llūr coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam 6� ta-m Irāyūr coṭṭai tiruvaṭikaḷpaṭṭar pakkal koṇṭuṭaiye
ṉāṉa cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam �- m piṭākai coḻaṇukkanallūr nilam Ii �-m
koṇṭi varatarācapaṭṭarpakkal koṇṭuṭaiyeṉāṉa cuttavallinallūr coḻaṇukkanallūr
nilam �- m Āka nilam 2 100 8� kku ṭṭa 6 1000 2 100 5 10 Ippaṇam Āṟāyirat tirunūṟṟu Aimpatukkum Ā
Digital edition of SII 8.265 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
